## Validation

- [ ] `PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 pytest`
- [ ] Added or updated focused tests
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Updated docs / schemas / frozen outputs when relevant

## Data hygiene

- [ ] No private traces, credentials, IMEIs, or large raw datasets are committed
- [ ] OSM-derived assets include attribution when committed
